I'm looking forward to your early reply.

Li Hua

Dear Jim,
Long time no see! I'm sorry to hear that your parents didn't allow you to have a weekly riding trip with your friends.
It's a big challenge for our age students to have such a long time activity. I believe your parents worry about your safety, because there might be a range of emergency and challenges.
To solve this problem, it's important to make schedule of the whole trip. It's helpful to search the weather on that week ahead so that you'll know to prepare the fit clothes. If I were you, I would give this plan table and schedule to my parents to show that I'm ready for different situations. Remember to be patient when you communicate with them.
Don't be disappointed, Jim! I believe your parents will be proud of your identity!
Yours,
Li Hua

Dear Jim,
It's nice to hear from you. Knowing that your cycling plan is not permitted, I'm writing to console you and give you some advice.
It is pretty normal for parents to reject children's travelling plans out of safety and monetary concerns. After all, a week's away from home justifiably arouses parents' anxiety. I'm sure your plan could be sanctioned, worry you would adapt your plan to circumvent the issues and concerns of your parents. so long as don't about it
My suggestion is that you should talk with your parents initially in order to know about their worries. Then you should take safety precautions and measurements to guarantee the safety of yours and your classmates. In addition to that, you should inform your parents all the details of the trip, including destination, estimated time, accommodation, etc.
I hope my letter would be of both consolation and benefaction to you. May you have a nice trip!
Yours,
Li Hua

Dear Jim,
Sorry for hearing that you are upset by parents' denying. Riding with friends is a great arrangement for the vacation, so I think there are some proposals I can give you to persuade your parents.
Initially, you can tell your parents what riding can benefit you. Riding can keep us fit, help maintaining our physical health. What's more, it's free and environment-friendly. In addition, riding can let us view the beautiful scenes with a relaxed mood, it also benefits our mental health. Finally, go out with friends can make you more positive in socializing.
At the same time, considered that they are your parents, they might be worried about the safety. For that reason, you need to wear some special equipments to protect yourself from getting injured. You should arrange the route, carefully keep yourself and your friends from getting lost or coming across other dangerous.
That's all. I hope my proposals could be considering and helpful. Hope both you and your parents can be happy.
Yours,
Li Hua
